title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 -  11 - 2017: My house in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog from Boulder, showing his house and neighborhood via Google Earth 3D. He talks about spending the day working on his Patreon page and personal website, and shares loose plans to keep writing over the coming weeks.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: impressed by its realism, felt like moving through a cartoon
worth the time investment despite slow progress; plans to focus on it for a few more weeks
finds it addictive and exciting, anticipates wanting more once he gets into it

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle lives in Boulder, B.A.L.A.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle started the video with his band on Google Earth.

claims.subject: Google Earth
claims.claim: Google Earth captured the angle of the windshield in the front and back perfectly, including a flower cow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's apartment is on the Northeastern side of the building.

claims.subject: Google Earth
claims.claim: Kyle did a panoramic at 3D from a thousand feet, and it looked very realistic.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle felt like he was in a cartoon while moving around his neighborhood at ground level in 3D on Google Earth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got out early in the dark and worked all day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is working on his Patreon and show page, which is now his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle encourages viewers to go to his website and have their computer read his intro to them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes his website will get better over time, even if it takes millions of years due to slow computers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to spend another couple of weeks working on his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle lives in a place where he has to be out of his house often.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle collaborates with others on ideas and enjoys explaining things to them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's mom and girlfriend help him with proofreading.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is not listening to anything else because he is focused on his current task.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle finds writing trippy and believes he will get hooked on it after finishing his current project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle wonders if it would be possible to learn how to write and ride a bike at the same time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle considered writing a bike and doing simple stuff simultaneously.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks it would be impressive if someone could write a bike and write at the same time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle ended the video after 39 minutes and plans to talk again tomorrow.
